infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:30, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, TGR Haas F1 Team Document 50 Date 04 July 2026 Time 16:51 No / Driver 31 - Esteban Ocon

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:30, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
TGR Haas F1 Team
Document 50
Date 04 July 2026
Time 16:51
No / Driver 31 - Esteban Ocon
Reason Alleged Breach of Article B1.8.4 a) of the FIA F1 Regulations and Article 2.5.5 b) of
Appendix H to the FIA International Sporting Code (failing to slow for single yellow
flags in Turn 13).
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury
